chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ أَبِي ذَرٍّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 383)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 383)
text: كَانَ حَيْثُ طُلِقَتْ آمِنَةُ بِنْتُ وَهْبٍ وَ أَخَذَهَا الْمَخَاضُ بِالنَّبِيِّ (صلى الله عليه وآله) حَضَرَتْهَا فَاطِمَةُ بِنْتُ أَسَدٍ امْرَأَةُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ فَلَمْ تَزَلْ مَعَهَا حَتَّى وَضَعَتْ فَقَالَتْ إِحْدَاهُمَا لِلْأُخْرَى هَلْ تَرَيْنَ مَا أَرَى فَقَالَتْ وَ مَا تَرَيْنَ قَالَتْ هَذَا النُّورَ الَّذِي قَدْ سَطَعَ مَا بَيْنَ الْمَشْرِقِ وَ الْمَغْرِبِ فَبَيْنَمَا هُمَا كَذَلِكَ إِذْ دَخَلَ عَلَيْهِمَا أَبُو طَالِبٍ فَقَالَ لَهُمَا مَا لَكُمَا مِنْ أَيِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ تَعْجَبَانِ فَأَخْبَرَتْهُ فَاطِمَةُ بِالنُّورِ الَّذِي قَدْ رَأَتْ فَقَالَ لَهَا أَبُو طَالِبٍ أَ لَا أُبَشِّرُكِ فَقَالَتْ بَلَى فَقَالَ أَمَا إِنَّكِ سَتَلِدِينَ غُلَاماً يَكُونُ وَصِيَّ هَذَا الْمَوْلُودِ.

en.hubeali: H 14908 – Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Ayyub, from Muhammad Bin Ziyad, from Asbaat Bin Saalim, who has narrated the following:

Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘When Aamina Bint Wahabas went behind the curtain, and was taken before the ‘nazool’ of the Prophetsaww, Fatima Bin Asadas the wife of Abu Talibas was present with heras. Sheas did not cease to be with heras until shesa was blessed. So one of themas said to the otheras, ‘Did youas see what Ias saw?’ Sheas said, ‘And what did youas see?’ Sheas said, ‘This light which has brightened up what is in between the East and the West and what is in between the two as well’. Then Abu Talibas came up to themas and said to themas both, ‘What is the matter with youas two? Which thing has astounded youas two?’ So Fatimaas informed himas of the light which sheas had seen. So Abu Talibas said to heras, ‘Indeed! Ias give youas good news!’ Sheas said, ‘Yes’. So heas said, ‘Youas will be blessed with the oneasws who will be the successorasws of this newbornsaww’.
en.sarwar: 461. Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Abdullah Bin Al-Salt, from Yunus, and from Abdul Aziz Bin Al-Muhtady, from a man, who has narrated the following: Abu Al-Hassan the Last (a.s.) regarding the Statement of the High: “[57:11] Who is he that will Loan to Allah a beautiful loan? for (Allah) will increase it manifold to his credit, and he will have (besides) a liberal Reward”, he (a.s.) said; ‘It is the ‘good’ towards the Imam (a.s.) during the government of the mischief’.
